angles.runtime-probes: Propose printk/devmem/UART probes that answer a yes/no question before a full kernel behavior change.
angles.source-registry: Name concrete source files, registers, and call paths to audit. Reject anything already closed by H009-H036.

context: Current blocker: A733 SDMMC0 normal IDMAC stalls at first descriptor fetch. PIO reads, small PIO CMD18, partition discovery, CMD49 PIO cache-enable, and read-only root mount work. Closed: descriptor geometry/address shifts/below4G/coherent vs streaming/64-bit mask, safe MSI/IOMMU/NSI bits, public U-Boot IRQ40, and descriptor end-of-ring bit H036. Need source-backed or cheap runtime tests only.
